title: A Letter For You
paragraphs: I do not always know how to say everything out loud,^800 so I made this little page instead.
You make my days softer, brighter, and much more fun than they would be without you.
I love the way you smile,^700 the way you care,^700 and the way you make even simple moments feel important.
I hope this makes you smile, even a little.
Thank you for being you.^1000 I am lucky to have you.
